address: 110 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10009, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Menu is delivered as image links (PNG files) named e.g. 'DinnerAlisonEastHarlem.png' / 'BrunchAlisonEastHarlem.png' for every section, including on the general /menu page. This strongly suggests the posted images are for Alison's East Harlem location (1651 Lexington Ave), not the East Village / St Marks location (110 St Marks Pl) that is the subject restaurant. No East Village-specific menu images or text were found on the official site. Not used as the menu source for this reason.

Storefront listing is explicitly named 'Alison St Marks - 110 Saint Marks Pl' confirming correct location. However DoorDash displayed the store as 'not active' at time of access, and the page's virtualized rendering only surfaced the Lunch-Appetizers category (4 dishes) in this session; Lunch-Sandwiches, Lunch-Sides, Lunch-Fresh Oysters, Lunch-Mains, Lunch-Eggs, Lunch-Salads & Bowls, and Lunch-Coffee category labels were visible but their dish-level content did not load. Treat this restaurant's menu coverage as partial.
Page requires an address to be entered before showing any menu content; no menu text rendered.

manual_review_reason: Only 4 of an unknown total number of dishes were recoverable; a fuller pass (e.g. re-checking DoorDash once active, or trying Grubhub/Uber Eats for the same 110 St Marks Pl location) is recommended.
